Sincerely,

sectionChild5.sc5Content: Passionate Blockchain Developer with hands-on experience in Solidity smart contract development, DeFi protocols, and Web3 front-end integration. Seeking an entry-level role to build secure, decentralised applications that push the boundaries of what is possible on-chain.

Proficient in Solidity for writing, testing, and deploying ERC-20, ERC-721 (NFT), and ERC-1155 smart contracts on Ethereum and EVM-compatible chains.
Strong understanding of DeFi concepts including AMMs, liquidity pools, yield farming, and flash loan mechanics.
Experience with development frameworks including Hardhat and Foundry, and testing using Chai/Mocha and Forge.
Familiar with Web3 front-end integration using ethers.js, wagmi, and RainbowKit for building dApp interfaces in React.
Knowledge of Layer 2 scaling solutions including Polygon, Arbitrum, and Optimism and cross-chain bridge mechanics.

sectionChild7ArrayList.sc7ContentDetail:
Built a Uniswap V2-inspired AMM DEX from scratch using Solidity, featuring constant-product pricing, liquidity provision, and ERC-20 token swapping.
Wrote a comprehensive Hardhat test suite with 95% contract coverage using Chai, catching 6 edge-case vulnerabilities before deployment.
Deployed and verified contracts on Polygon Mumbai testnet; built a React + ethers.js front-end enabling wallet connection via MetaMask and WalletConnect.
Processed over $180K in test-net swap volume during a 2-week community beta with 300+ participants.

Developed an ERC-721 NFT marketplace smart contract with on-chain royalty enforcement using ERC-2981, ensuring creators receive 5-10% on every secondary sale.
Implemented a Dutch auction minting mechanism and whitelist functionality using Merkle proofs to reduce gas costs for allowlist verification by 60%.
Audited contract logic using Slither and manual review, resolving 3 medium-severity issues including a re-entrancy vulnerability in the withdrawal function.

sectionChild5.sc5Content: Available upon request

sectionChild8.sc8Address:
Hiring Manager,
ChainForge Labs,
1 Web3 Plaza,
Miami, FL 33133
sectionChild8.sc8Content:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the Blockchain Developer position at ChainForge Labs. I have built production-ready smart contracts on Ethereum and Polygon, developed a functional DEX, and identified and resolved real security vulnerabilities in my own code. I am deeply passionate about decentralised technology and eager to contribute to your protocol development.

I would love to discuss this opportunity.

Sincerely,
